creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
Thank you for your detailed answer.

TOML option was turned off. When I set it ON it builds fine.

We are using poudriere mainly to turn off unnecessary options to shrink the list of required dependencies. Mainly to disable X11 support on some packages, NLS, DOC and some other extra options too.
